{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323052217397A12FE75E68438A003"}"},"total":762},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7540220547530834750","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体节奏的话是比较快的不会出戏，不会有过多的感情戏，但是也能让你感觉到喜欢。，我一般不太喜欢看这种只有不到100章的小说，主要是简介性我我喜欢看这种类型的小说。哪怕他只有63张，我也愿意试一下看完了很不错。
至于缺点的话，因为第一遍看的很爽，我就可能感情代入不太深也可能因为剧透的原因，卫兵死的时候，我心里面确实挺难受，但是没有太大感触。而且我觉得现实世界其实也可以加一下，不能加太多但总感觉还是很少的，就如果光看游戏的话，我更希望2条线均衡发展。当然也有可能是更新的太少了，有没有类似的小说推荐一下呀？真的很喜欢。","text_exts":[{"e":248,"s":244,"text":"小说推荐","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%E6%8E%A8%E8%8D%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742145378438A003%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227540220547530834750%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227529181925315972121%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%E6%8E%A8%E8%8D%90%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755597277,"group_id":"7529181925315972121","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0WX6mqt/aOwT9Kba5YqzKwH/r5zOdY8GMz5M5Pr5PiF","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/19c3da4490c0472cbce79dea764e2026~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790721&x-signature=Z%2F2uFWVoTpVLz1u1yOsgNMwsjc8%3D","user_id":"3002122934694819","user_name":"沐雪大帅哥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3002122934694819","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7529181925315972121","book_info":{"abstract":"吴想不知为何，穿越到自己所玩的游戏——《无限英魂》之中。
变成了别人的电子宠物，不断的战斗，经历各种副本。
这垃圾游戏抽到的角色，死亡就不能复活，难度极高。
游戏角色甚至能反抗玩家的指令。
充满压力的压力值设定，游戏角色会死亡，或疯狂，自杀，甚至袭击队友。
您抽的卡，杀了另一张卡的事情，完全有可能
发生。
吴想发现，他天赋的触发率也有些不正常。
【杀戮之心（击杀生物，有极小概率获得属性点或独特技能，击杀boss时概率将提升）】
疯狂的队友杀了！隐藏boss杀了！
可事情好像没那么简单，他以前培养的游戏角色似乎也同样存在。
而且这屑游好像要入侵现实！
总之，先要想办法让玩家为他氪金。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8d021a8ecb7558348a42c0b991b21095","author":"灰白色的雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7529181925315972121","book_name":"游戏求生：穿越一星卡，任务弑神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":874,"name":"卡牌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=874&name=卡牌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7529181967477129753","read_count":"22117","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1042605"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"495","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,网游,升级流,副本,卡牌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f7bc879169f12ce93c5bfd879403dfbe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398537&x-signature=M0%2F6LEnwoiSW%2BCt24H88p1vFVts%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3545272088789102","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323052217397A12FE75E68438A003"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读31分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,
